flags.description: Export format (default: md)
Write output to a file instead of stdout
Use a concise release-notes title and output shape
Output title (default: Changelog or Release Notes)
Release/version heading (default: Unreleased)
Read release/version heading from nearest package.json
Release date (default: resolved tag date when available, otherwise today)
Include items changed on or after this date
Derive --since from the previous git tag
Include items changed on or before this date
Derive --until from the current release tag when it exists
Comma-separated statuses (default: closed)
version, release, or milestone (default: version)
Emit an empty release section when no items match
Include item URLs in generated entries (default: false)
Append compact item metadata (type/status/priority/release/milestone) to each entry
Make item IDs clickable links to .toon files under the base URL
Output file path (default: CHANGELOG.md)
Return markdown instead of writing a file
Changelog title (default: Changelog)
Release/version heading (default: Unreleased)
Read release/version heading from nearest package.json
Release date (default: resolved tag date when available, otherwise today)
Include items changed on or after this date
Derive --since from the previous git tag
Include items changed on or before this date
Derive --until from the current release tag when it exists
Rebuild full history from git release tag windows
Git tag glob for --all-release-tags (default: v*)
Comma-separated statuses (default: closed)
version, release, or milestone (default: version)
Within-release grouping: category, type, status, or label (default: category)
Use Conventional-Commits headings (Features/Bug Fixes/...) for category grouping
Append a Contributors list per release from item assignee/author
Keep only the most recent N release sections (history modes only)
Keep only releases at or newer than this version (history modes only)
Emit a Breaking Changes section listing items detected as breaking
Return a suggested semver bump (major/minor/patch); never writes the changelog
Append the first N chars of each item body to its entry
Prefix section headings with conventional emoji (Added 🎉, Fixed 🐛, ...)
Append compact item metadata (type/status/priority/release/milestone) to each entry
Return the full structured changelog document (releases->sections->items)
Return item-selection diagnostics (counts, exclusions, hints)
replace or prepend existing changelog (default: replace)
Emit an empty release section when no items match
Include item URLs in generated entries (default: false)
Make item IDs clickable links to .toon files under the base URL
Do not write; report whether the changelog would change

extension_commands.description: Export changelog or release notes through the pm import/export pipeline.

flags.description: Export format (default: md)
Write output to a file instead of stdout
Use a concise release-notes title and output shape

Release/version heading (default: Unreleased)

Include items changed on or after this date
Derive --since from the previous git tag
Include items changed on or before this date
Derive --until from the current release tag when it exists
Comma-separated statuses (default: closed)
version, release, or milestone (default: version)
Emit an empty release section when no items match
Include item URLs in generated entries (default: false)
Append compact item metadata (type/status/priority/release/milestone) to each entry
Make item IDs clickable links to .toon files under the base URL

extension_commands.intent: export changelog release notes as markdown or json

extension_commands.description: Generate a CHANGELOG.md file from pm items.

Return markdown instead of writing a file

Release/version heading (default: Unreleased)

Release date (default: resolved tag date when available, otherwise today)
Include items changed on or after this date

Include items changed on or before this date
Derive --until from the current release tag when it exists
Rebuild full history from git release tag windows
Git tag glob for --all-release-tags (default: v*)
Comma-separated statuses (default: closed)
version, release, or milestone (default: version)
Within-release grouping: category, type, status, or label (default: category)
Use Conventional-Commits headings (Features/Bug Fixes/...) for category grouping
Append a Contributors list per release from item assignee/author
Keep only the most recent N release sections (history modes only)
Keep only releases at or newer than this version (history modes only)
Emit a Breaking Changes section listing items detected as breaking
Return a suggested semver bump (major/minor/patch); never writes the changelog
Append the first N chars of each item body to its entry
Prefix section headings with conventional emoji (Added 🎉, Fixed 🐛, ...)
Append compact item metadata (type/status/priority/release/milestone) to each entry
Return the full structured changelog document (releases->sections->items)
Return item-selection diagnostics (counts, exclusions, hints)
replace or prepend existing changelog (default: replace)
Emit an empty release section when no items match
Include item URLs in generated entries (default: false)
Make item IDs clickable links to .toon files under the base URL
Do not write; report whether the changelog would change

extension_commands.intent: generate changelog release notes from completed pm items

schedulePreset.description: Schedule-centric create preset for Reminder, Meeting, and Event types.

status.description: Item status value. Statuses are project-configurable via .agents/pm/settings.json (schema block); the built-in defaults are draft, open, in_progress, blocked, closed, canceled. Custom statuses defined for the project are accepted — discover the active set with the pm_contracts tool (workspace.statuses) or `pm contracts`. Unknown statuses are rejected at runtime with a did-you-mean hint rather than blocked by a fixed schema enum.

type.description: Item type name from the active runtime type registry.

unset.description: Repeatable list of front-matter fields to clear explicitly during create/update mutations.

id.description: Item identifier for read or mutation actions.

message.description: History message for mutation audit trail.

status.description: Item status value. Statuses are project-configurable via .agents/pm/settings.json (schema block); the built-in defaults are draft, open, in_progress, blocked, closed, canceled. Custom statuses defined for the project are accepted — discover the active set with the pm_contracts tool (workspace.statuses) or `pm contracts`. Unknown statuses are rejected at runtime with a did-you-mean hint rather than blocked by a fixed schema enum.

noPager.description: Disable pager integration for help and long output.

path.description: Optional PM data root override for this invocation.

profile.description: Emit deterministic timing diagnostics to stderr.

storage.description: For stats action: include aggregate history-stream storage metrics (total streams/lines/bytes, largest + deepest streams, oldest/newest entries) for compaction and storage planning.

checkOnly.description: For health action, run read-only diagnostics without refreshing vectors.

checkTelemetry.description: For health action, probe telemetry endpoint health and include network diagnostics.

failOnWarn.description: Alias for strictExit in health/validate/extension-doctor action payloads.

full.description: Enable command-specific full/detail output mode when supported, such as deep item reads for get or full payload mode for search/history.

noExtensions.description: Disable extension loading for this invocation.

noPager.description: Disable pager integration for help and long output.

noRefresh.description: For health action, skip vector refresh while still running checks.

path.description: Optional PM data root override for this invocation.

profile.description: Emit deterministic timing diagnostics to stderr.

refreshVectors.description: For health action, explicitly refresh stale vectors.

skipDrift.description: For health action, skip history drift hash checks for a faster diagnostic run.

skipIntegrity.description: For health action, skip item/history file integrity checks for a faster diagnostic run.

skipVectors.description: For health action, skip vectorization checks for a faster diagnostic run.

strictDirectories.description: Treat optional item-type directories as required health failures.

strictExit.description: Return non-zero exit when health/validate/extension-doctor warnings are present.

summary.description: When true for deps action, return counts only without full tree/graph payloads.

verboseStaleItems.description: For health action, include full stale-item arrays in vectorization details.

checkLifecycle.description: Run active-item lifecycle governance drift checks.

checkStaleBlockers.description: Include stale blocker-pattern diagnostics in lifecycle checks.

dependencyCycleSeverity.description: Set dependency-cycle warning policy for lifecycle checks.

failOnWarn.description: Alias for strictExit in health/validate/extension-doctor action payloads.

fixHints.description: For validate action, add a machine-executable fix_hints[] of pm commands to each failing check's details.

includePmInternals.description: Include PM storage internals in tracked-all candidate scans.

strictExit.description: Return non-zero exit when health/validate/extension-doctor warnings are present.

verboseDiagnostics.description: For validate action, include full diagnostic ID lists instead of compact summaries.

verboseFileLists.description: For validate action, include full file-path lists for --check-files details.

dryRun.description: Preview command effects without mutating storage artifacts.

gcScope.description: Repeatable gc scope selector values (index, embeddings, runtime, locks).

availabilityOnly.description: When true, contracts action returns only action availability payloads (mutually exclusive projection mode).

command.description: Scope contracts output to one CLI command name; action/schema surfaces narrow by default.

contractAction.description: Filter contracts schema to one tool action.

flagsOnly.description: When true, contracts action returns only command flag surface payloads (mutually exclusive projection mode).

action.description: export changelog release notes as markdown or json

date.description: Release date (default: resolved tag date when available, otherwise today)

includeEmpty.description: Emit an empty release section when no items match

includeLinks.description: Include item URLs in generated entries (default: false)

includeMetadata.description: Append compact item metadata (type/status/priority/release/milestone) to each entry

itemUrlBase.description: Make item IDs clickable links to .toon files under the base URL

output.description: Write output to a file instead of stdout

releaseNotes.description: Use a concise release-notes title and output shape

releaseVersionFromPackage.description: Read release/version heading from nearest package.json

since.description: Include items changed on or after this date

sincePreviousTag.description: Derive --since from the previous git tag

title.description: Output title (default: Changelog or Release Notes)

until.description: Include items changed on or before this date

untilReleaseTag.description: Derive --until from the current release tag when it exists

action.description: generate changelog release notes from completed pm items

allReleaseTags.description: Rebuild full history from git release tag windows

bodyPreview.description: Append the first N chars of each item body to its entry

breakingChanges.description: Emit a Breaking Changes section listing items detected as breaking

changelogJson.description: Return the full structured changelog document (releases->sections->items)

check.description: Do not write; report whether the changelog would change

contributors.description: Append a Contributors list per release from item assignee/author

conventional.description: Use Conventional-Commits headings (Features/Bug Fixes/...) for category grouping

date.description: Release date (default: resolved tag date when available, otherwise today)

emojiPrefix.description: Prefix section headings with conventional emoji (Added 🎉, Fixed 🐛, ...)

includeEmpty.description: Emit an empty release section when no items match

includeLinks.description: Include item URLs in generated entries (default: false)

includeMetadata.description: Append compact item metadata (type/status/priority/release/milestone) to each entry

itemUrlBase.description: Make item IDs clickable links to .toon files under the base URL

limit.description: Keep only the most recent N release sections (history modes only)

mode.description: replace or prepend existing changelog (default: replace)

releaseVersionFromPackage.description: Read release/version heading from nearest package.json

sectionBy.description: Within-release grouping: category, type, status, or label (default: category)

since.description: Include items changed on or after this date

sincePreviousTag.description: Derive --since from the previous git tag

sinceVersion.description: Keep only releases at or newer than this version (history modes only)

stdout.description: Return markdown instead of writing a file

suggestSemver.description: Return a suggested semver bump (major/minor/patch); never writes the changelog

until.description: Include items changed on or before this date

untilReleaseTag.description: Derive --until from the current release tag when it exists
